<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Update the file we use for the initial conditions. The new file uses the last month of long run 4035 (19 year run) as initial conditions.

https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/4035

title: New spun up IC
